<!-- One sentence describing the feature. -->

<!-- What pain point, gap, or opportunity does this address? Who is affected? -->

<!-- Describe the approach you have in mind. -->

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you discard them? -->

- [ ] This touches production behavior (routes, API, auth, deployment)

## Expected value

<!-- Quantify the benefit where possible: time saved, errors prevented, users unblocked, etc. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Designs, references, related issues, or constraints. -->
